What We Offer

Our
Services

01

Maintenance

A thorough exterior hand wash, wheel clean, tyre dressing, and interior vacuum. Perfect for keeping your car in top condition regularly.

From £45

02

Full Detail

Comprehensive inside and out — deep interior clean, machine polish, protection wax, and glass treatment.

From £120

ADD-ON

Pet Hair Removal

Specialist removal of embedded pet hair from seats, carpets and boot. Available as an add-on to any service — leaves your interior completely hair-free.

Ask for pricing

Our Story

Born from
Ambition

Diamond Royale Detailing wasn't built in a boardroom — it was built on drive. Founded in 2025 by Anthony, a self-starter with a passion for side hustles and a hunger for something more, the business grew from a simple belief: that every car deserves to be treated like a showpiece.

What started as a passion became a profession. Anthony took that entrepreneurial spirit and channelled it into a premium detailing service that refuses to cut corners — delivering results that speak louder than any sales pitch.

Anthony
Founder & CEO
Est. 2025
Diamond Royale Detailing

Why Choose Us

Built on
Precision

We don't just clean cars — we restore them. Every vehicle that comes through us is treated with the same care and attention to detail regardless of make or model. No shortcuts, no rush jobs.


Using only professional-grade products, our trained team delivers results that speak for themselves. Based locally, trusted widely.

How It Works

The Process

Book Now
01

Get a Quote

Tell us your vehicle and the service you need. We'll give you a transparent, no-obligation quote.

02

Book a Time

Choose a time and date that works for you. We'll come to you or you can drop off.

03

We Get to Work

Sit back while we take care of every inch. We update you throughout the process.

04

Drive Away

Collect your freshly detailed vehicle looking better than the day it left the showroom.

Referral Programme

Share & Save

Know someone whose car needs some love? Refer a friend — when they book and complete any service, you both get 20% off your next detail. Simple as that.

01

Refer a Friend

Share our number or website with someone who needs their car detailed.

02

They Book & Use Us

Your friend books any service with Diamond Royale and gets it completed.

03

You Both Save 20%

Both you and your friend receive 20% off your next service. Everyone wins.
